## Validation

<!-- List commands run, benchmark artifacts generated, or checks intentionally skipped. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm api:check` when public API changed
- [ ] `pnpm lint:packaging` when package exports or publish config changed

## Contributor Checklist
